productDisplayName: Fila Men Tide Navy Blue Sandals
description: sandals from fila are made with the finest raw materials crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This pair of sandals from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. Wear this pair with your off-duty ensembles. Upper One wide rubber strap across the forefoot and midfoot area Soft rubber footbed with printed branding Outsole Rubber outsole with lined grooves and branding Sandal care Rub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
